LanguageData.USAC_CorpseStorage.label: USAC standard corpse storage solution
LanguageData.USAC_CorpseStorage.description: The only humanely authorized corpse storage container currently approved by USAC, allowing multiple corpses to be stored in a compact footprint. This device can only be ordered through USAC-authorized dealers. It is an advanced upgrade over body bags, providing powered refrigeration without attrition during storage, making it the best choice for long-term preservation of biological assets.
